data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario regarding agent-specific rate limits.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario behavior related to agent-specific rate limits, but the provided evidence does not include any specific checks or data that confirm this functionality is implemented or functioning as required. The linked use case discusses capturing ad click identifiers and session-to-checkout linkage, but there is no direct evidence provided to support the validation of agent-specific rate limits. Therefore, the assessment is inconclusive due to a lack of concrete evidence.
gaps: No evidence of agent-specific rate limits validation.
